dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, your push to {quest_action} stirred them up. {quest_threat} have tightened their grip on {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} managed to get a message from {quest_stakes}: they are alive but desperate. The {enemy_type} have reinforced their positions {location_hint}. We need to fight through before it is too late.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are so close. Do not let them slip away now.

playerResponses.text: They are alive. That is all I need to hear. I am going.
More resistance means more danger. I will need better equipment.

dialogueChunks.intro: Things have gotten worse since you began to {quest_action}, {player_name}. {quest_threat} retaliated against {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that the {enemy_type} moved {quest_stakes} deeper toward {quest_focus}. There is a back route {location_hint} that might let you slip past the main force. Bring {quest_item} to break through any barriers.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is their last move. If we can outmaneuver them, we win.

playerResponses.text: A back route sounds smart. I will take it.
Sneaking in was not part of the plan, but fine.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I have grim news. Your work to {quest_action} revealed that {quest_threat} are not the only danger at {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} are using the area {location_hint} as a staging ground. {quest_ally} believes they plan to move {quest_stakes} permanently unless we act now. We need someone to scatter their forces and create an opening.
dialogueChunks.outro: This may be our last chance. If they move now, we will never find them.

playerResponses.text: Last chance or not, I will make it count.
You keep saying 'last chance'. It had better be true this time.
